children.name: Morus
children.description: Europe's largest seabird, plunge-diving from 30 metres at 100 km/h, closing its wings at the last moment. Air sacs beneath the skin and around the skull cushion the impact. Thousands pass along the Swedish west coast in autumn heading to Atlantic wintering areas.

children.name: Morus bassanus
children.description: Europe's largest seabird, plunge-diving from up to 30 metres with folded wings to spear fish far below the surface. Thousands stream past the Swedish west coast in autumn en route to Atlantic wintering grounds.
